case_title: HANSEN, MICHAEL et al VS PATTERSON, ANN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HANSEN, MICHAEL MICHAEL HANSEN & ASSOC. AS TO DEFENDANT PATTERSON, ANN TESSA FINANCIAL GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PLTF'S ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT.
